question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list any main sections of the thesis; it only contains a single phrase that indicates a description of a concluding chapter. Therefore, it fails to meet the requirement of listing chapters.

question: Description
feedback: The text provides no brief description of the contents of any section. It merely states that it is a description of the concluding chapter, which is insufficient for the evaluation criterion.

question: Structure
feedback: Because the text neither lists chapters nor describes their contents, it is impossible to infer the general structure of the thesis from this single phrase. Thus, it does not satisfy the structure requirement.
